title: When to Use a Local Model
concept: Choose local models (like Llama-3-8B) when data privacy is mandatory, internet access is limited, or you need cheap task customization via LoRA.

exercises.prompt: Where does a "local" AI model run?

options.text: On your own computer or private hardware
On a giant tech company's public cloud server

exercises.explain: A local model is one that runs directly on your own device rather than on a remote server owned by another company.

cards.title: AI Without the Internet?
cards.body: Have you ever wondered how to use powerful AI when you don't have internet, or when you're working with secrets that can never be shared online? That is where local models come to save the day!

cards.title: What is a Local Model?
cards.body: A local model is an AI program (like Llama-3-8B) that runs entirely on your own computer or private server. Because it doesn't need to send data to someone else's cloud, it offers total privacy, works offline, and lets you customize it cheaply using your own data.

cards.title: The Personal Safe vs. Bank Vault
cards.body: Think of cloud models like renting space in a secure public bank vault where you must travel to deposit things. A local model is like having a heavy, personal safe bolted to your own bedroom floor. It works even if the roads are blocked, and nobody else ever sees what you put inside.

cards.title: AI in the Middle of the Ocean
cards.body: Imagine a research ship in the middle of the ocean with no internet. By loading a local model onto their onboard laptops, the scientists can analyze data and write reports instantly without needing a satellite connection.

cards.title: Myth: Local Means Weak
cards.body: Many believe that local models are too weak to be useful. In reality, smaller local models (like Llama-3-8B) are incredibly smart, fast, and can be customized with fine-tuning to perform specific tasks just as well as giant cloud models!

cards.title: Cloud vs. Local
cards.body: Let's compare where your data goes and how the model connects when comparing cloud vs. local setups.

right.text: Data stays on your machine. Works 100% offline and privately.

left.text: Sends data over the internet to external servers. Requires connection.

exercises.prompt: What is a major advantage of running a local model like Llama-3-8B?

options.text: They are always much larger than cloud models.
They can run completely offline without an internet connection.
They automatically update themselves every hour.
They are hosted by external companies like OpenAI.

exercises.explain: Local models run entirely on your own hardware, which means they do not require an active internet connection to answer your prompts.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Local models allow you to cheaply customize the AI for specific tasks using your own hardware.
exercises.explain: This is true! Techniques like LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) allow you to easily and cheaply customize local models on your own hardware.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the rule about local models.
exercises.sentence: You should use a local model when data [blank] is your number one priority.
exercises.explain: Because the data never leaves your own computer, local models guarantee total privacy for sensitive information.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is an example of a local AI model in action?

options.text: A web browser extension that sends your writing to a cloud server for proofreading.
A customer service chatbot on a website that stops working when your internet drops.
A translation tool installed directly on a subway train's computer that works underground.

exercises.explain: Option C is an AI assistant running locally, because it is running on the train's local computer system without relying on cloud servers.

exercises.prompt: Your company needs to process highly confidential medical records without letting any data leave the building, and you have no internet access. Why should you choose a local model?

options.text: Cloud models are always cheaper and safer for private client data.
Local models require a constant high-speed internet connection to run.
When you need offline access, absolute privacy, and cheap customization.
Only when you want the absolute largest model size available.

exercises.explain: A local model is the ultimate choice when you need absolute privacy (no data leaves your machine), need it to work completely offline, and want to customize it cheaply (using techniques like LoRA) without paying cloud API fees.
